screen.traveleraddon.title: Traveler
screen.traveleraddon.description_v2: The traveler checks what the colony currently needs. Spend 60 amethyst shards to fulfill the visible colony demand bundle, or use the free market to buy individual items.
screen.traveleraddon.search_hint: Search by localized name or item id
message.traveleraddon.colony_missing: Unable to locate the current colony.
message.traveleraddon.warehouse_missing: No usable colony warehouse was found.
message.traveleraddon.warehouse_full: The warehouse does not have enough space. Trade failed.
message.traveleraddon.no_demands: The colony has no recognized material demands right now.
message.traveleraddon.demand_already_use: This traveler's colony demand bundle has already been purchased.
message.traveleraddon.not_enough_shards_: You do not have 35 amethyst shards.
You do not have enough amethyst shards. This item costs %s.
message.traveleraddon.demand_purchase_su: The traveler has fulfilled the current colony demands and sent them to the warehouse. Note: some special materials cannot be supplied directly by the traveler, so this demand bundle has been discounted from 60 to 35 amethyst shards as compensation.
message.traveleraddon.market_item_missin: The selected market item could not be found.
message.traveleraddon.market_item_blocke: This item is blocked from purchase.
message.traveleraddon.market_purchase_su: The traveler purchased %s for %s amethyst shards.
message.traveleraddon.market_limit_reach: This traveler's free-market purchase limit has been used up.
message.traveleraddon.traveler_arrived: My lord, the traveler has arrived.
message.traveleraddon.traveler_departed: My lord, the traveler has departed.
message.traveleraddon.traveler_killed: My lord, the traveler has been killed by %s.
